caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold letters, and a gold watch sits at a desk in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repetitive logo consisting of five gold stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE." Above him, a screen displays the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black speaker and a black mug with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT". To the left, a small logo with "TALK" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and mostly still, gazing slightly to the left with a neutral expression, while the camera angle and his posture remain consistent across the frames.
